# ISSS608 Group 10 Project Meeting Minutes Records

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Project Meeting 1:** Project Proposal, Project Methodology, Project Timeline

**Date:** 28 Feb 2026

**Time:** 3:45pm – 4.15pm

**In Attendance:** Ng Meng Ye, Chandru Kolanchiyappan, Gautamgovan Elangovan

[Click here to view meeting minutes - 1](https://visual-analytics-group-10-project.netlify.app/meetingminutes/projectmeeting1)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Project Meeting 2:** R Shiny dashboard modules

**Date:** 04 Mar 2026

**Time:** 3:45pm – 4.15pm

**In Attendance:** Ng Meng Ye, Chandru Kolanchiyappan, Gautamgovan Elangovan

[Click here to view meeting minutes - 2](https://visual-analytics-group-10-project.netlify.app/meetingminutes/projectmeeting2)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Project Meeting 3:** Project Netlify, Project Poster

**Date:** 21 Mar 2026

**Time:** 8pm – 8.30pm

**In Attendance:** Ng Meng Ye, Chandru Kolanchiyappan, Gautamgovan Elangovan

[Click here to view meeting minutes - 3](https://visual-analytics-group-10-project.netlify.app/meetingminutes/projectmeeting3)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Project Meeting 4:** Final Integration, Presentation Preparation & System Readiness

**Date:** 03 Apr 2026

**Time:** 2:30pm – 3:15pm

**In Attendance:** Ng Meng Ye, Chandru Kolanchiyappan, Gautamgovan Elangovan

[Click here to view meeting minutes - 4](https://visual-analytics-group-10-project.netlify.app/meetingminutes/projectmeeting4)
